title: cosmos sessilis var. stellatus
intro: Cosmos sessilis var. stellatus, also known as dwarf cosmos or star cosmos, is a variety of the cosmos plant, a flowering plant native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of cosmos sessilis var. stellatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to prevent scarring and promote tissue repair. Herbal preparations of cosmos sessilis var. stellatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds, or internally to support overall health and well-being.
